description: The Porsche Boxster E may be Porsche (the company - it's a different story if we're talking about the man)'s first attempt at an EV, but Ruf had already taken a go at producing Porsche EVs some 3 years before. UQM Technologies' PowerPhase 150 gave the car 201hp and 469Nm of torque while iron-phosphate lithium-ion batteries charges it.
creator: Keanny
